title: Trump and Iran Make a Deal to Stop Fighting
summary: President Donald Trump and Iran have made a deal to stop fighting for two weeks. Trump had set a deadline to attack Iran if no deal was made, but just before that, they agreed to a ceasefire. This means both sides will not fight and will talk to try to make peace forever. Iran will also let ships pass through the Strait of Hormuz, which is important for oil. The deal helped Trump avoid a hard choice between starting a big war or looking weak. Oil prices went down and stock markets went up because people are hopeful the fighting might end. But some people, like Democrats, criticized Trump's strong words about Iran. The deal is temporary, so they need to work hard in the next two weeks to make it last.

keywords.explanation: an agreement to stop fighting for a while
a time by which something must be done
talks to try to agree on something
a narrow waterway where many ships carry oil
the cost of oil, which can change based on news
a political group in the US that often disagrees with Trump

questions.question: What did Trump and Iran agree to do for two weeks?
Why is the Strait of Hormuz important in this deal?
options: It is a place for swimming
It is where ships carry oil
It is a type of food
questions.correct_answer: It is where ships carry oil

questions.question: What happened to oil prices after the deal was announced?
Who criticized Trump's words about Iran?
What is the main goal of the two-week talks?
What did Trump avoid by making this deal?
options: A choice between war or looking weak
questions.correct_answer: A choice between war or looking weak

background_read: This article is about a deal between the US and Iran to stop fighting. The US is led by President Donald Trump, and Iran is a country in the Middle East. They have been in conflict, which means they disagree and sometimes threaten to fight. A ceasefire is when both sides agree to stop fighting temporarily to talk. The Strait of Hormuz is a narrow sea passage where many oil tankers pass, so it is very important for global trade. Oil prices can go up or down based on news about conflicts because people worry about supply. Democrats are one of the two main political parties in the US, and they often have different opinions from Trump. This deal is a temporary solution, so they need to work on a longer peace.
Article_Structure: WHO: President Donald Trump and Iran
WHAT: A two-week ceasefire deal to stop fighting and allow negotiations
WHERE: Involves the US and Iran, focusing on the Strait of Hormuz
WHY: To avoid a war and try to make permanent peace, with Trump avoiding a hard choice

perspectives.description: Some people are hopeful because the deal stopped fighting and oil prices dropped, showing things might get better.
Others, like Democrats, criticize Trump's strong words and worry he is not fit to lead, even if the deal helps.
